headline: MU, LRCX, AMAT, GEV All Added to the S&P 100 As AI Stocks Gain Influence
summary: It’s the Super Bowl of index rebalancing tonight! The biggest news was the S&P 500 adding Vertiv (VRT), Lumentum (LITE), Coherent (COHR), and EchoStar (SATS). headline: PayPal Lawsuits And CEO Exit Shift Focus To Growth Credibility
summary: Multiple securities class action lawsuits have been filed against PayPal Holdings (NasdaqGS:PYPL) following its fourth quarter and full year 2025 results. The company announced the replacement of CEO Alex Chriss and withdrew its previously issued 2027 financial targets. Plaintiffs allege PayPal made materially false and misleading statements about growth prospects, branded checkout performance, and salesforce capabilities. PayPal operates a global digital payments platform that connects...

headline: 'E-shaped' economy is replacing a K-shaped one in 2026, economist says: The middle class is 'spending in a nervous way' now
